invariants.name: capability does not imply authority
invariants.civilization_scale_role: prevents capability from becoming implicit sovereignty

invariants.name: no valid object no action
invariants.statement: if no valid object exists -> nothing happens

invariants.name: validation before execution
invariants.civilization_scale_role: ensures legitimacy gates execution before reality mutation

invariants.name: validated object equals executed object
invariants.civilization_scale_role: prevents mutation between legitimacy and execution

invariants.name: proof required for finality
invariants.civilization_scale_role: binds claims of execution to verifiable evidence

invariants.name: local sovereignty preserved
invariants.civilization_scale_role: preserves local execution authority under federation

invariants.name: observability cannot create authority
invariants.civilization_scale_role: prevents dashboards and reports from becoming permission systems

invariants.name: governance mutation must be governed
invariants.statement: rules that govern execution must themselves be changed through governed objects

invariants.name: human steering remains structured and bounded
invariants.statement: human judgment remains sovereign only if converted into bounded decision objects
invariants.civilization_scale_role: keeps human governance meaningful under superintelligent coordination pressure

deepest_invariant: Superintelligence may scale cognition. It must not inherit permission.
